identity.name: NDR — Cryptojacking Stratum App-ID Validation
identity.summary: Auto-generated draft from CortexSim scenario SIM-NDR-003. Plane: NDR. Primary technique: T1496. Requires human enrichment of BIOC logic + panw_mapping rule_ids.
identity.description:
Auto-generated draft from CortexSim scenario SIM-NDR-003. Plane: NDR. Primary technique: T1496. Requires human enrichment of BIOC logic + panw_mapping rule_ids.

Source scenario: SIM-NDR-003.
UC: Cryptojacking App-ID Detection / TC: Stratum JSON-RPC Mining Pool Connection.

prerequisites.description: Lab environment matching scenario SIM-NDR-003 requirements.

payload.code:
# step-1: Stand up sinkhole TCP listener inside lab CIDR
# Operator must pre-deploy a sinkhole on 10.50.0.42:3333 (any TCP listener)
# to absorb the simulator's Stratum frames. Confirm reachability:
nc -zv 10.50.0.42 3333 || echo "[CortexSim] sinkhole reachable check (best-effort)"
# step-2: Launch Stratum JSON-RPC sessions against sinkhole
cat > /tmp/stratum-live.yml <<'YML'
campaign_id: CMP-NDR-003
name: "NDR validation — Stratum App-ID"
authorized_by: "domain-consultant@paloaltonetworks.com"
simulation_authorized: true
target_allowlist:
  - 10.50.0.0/24
dry_run: false
tags: [ndr, cryptojacking, stratum, eal]
steps:
  - step_id: step-01
    plugin: stratum_tcp_connect
    params:
      target_host: "10.50.0.42"
      target_port: 3333
      iterations: 5
      sleep_seconds: 15
      wallet: "cortexsim-test-wallet"
YML
python3 -m scripts.eal_simulator.cli run /tmp/stratum-live.yml --live

expected_artifacts.description: Process execution matching nc (heuristic from scenario step step-01)

biocs.name: Pre-flight: sinkhole port 3333 reachable
NGFW App-ID — Stratum/cryptocurrency-mining identified on outbound TCP
